name: UseZombie
description: Agent Delivery Control Plane — deterministic spec-to-PR automation for autonomous engineering teams.

agents.name: Echo
agents.description: Reads specs, explores the repo, produces ordered task plans (plan.json). Read-only access.

agents.name: Scout
agents.description: Implements code changes according to Echo's plan. Produces implementation.md. Full read/write/shell access.

agents.name: Warden
agents.description: Red-team reviewer. Checks Scout's work against spec, runs tests, produces validation.md with T1-T4 tiered findings.

operations.description: Queue a spec-to-PR run. Returns run_id and initial state SPEC_QUEUED.
Fetch run status, state transitions, artifacts, and policy events.
Re-queue a blocked or failed run with defect context injected into Scout.
Pause or unpause admission of new runs for a workspace.
List specs registered for a workspace, with status and pagination.
Scan workspace repo for PENDING_*.md files and upsert spec records. Idempotent.

revenue.description: Users supply their own LLM API keys. UseZombie bills per agent-second. Never stores LLM costs.
